name: Set Variable
description: Sets a variable value on scene, target object, or player data.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Set Variable

Sets a variable value on scene, target object, or player data.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `scope` | Scope | `enum` | `scene` | `Scene` (`scene`), `Object` (`object`), `Player` (`player`) |
| `path` | Path | `string` | `` | - |
| `mode` | Mode | `enum` | `set` | `Set` (`set`), `Increment` (`inc`) |
| `value` | Value | `string` | `` | - |
